TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Patrice Talon = Mntucing hngkawas 1958 idas 5 jiyax 1 ka Patrice Talon ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Benin ta sayang o kiya ka Patrice Talon, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 5 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Patrice Talon = Patrice Talon (Kari France: Patrice Guillaume Athanase Talon ; kngkawas 1958 idas 5diyax 1), hiya ka taxa Benin seyji jnwu, kngkawas 2016 mniq Soto Seyngkyo wada mbiyax mangal Soto Benin, idas 4 diyax 6 muda psdhuwan phiyu. Ndanan niya Patrice Talon pa mniq Qqpahan Wata Cyey u wada dha splawa 'Bukung Wata', kiya ka dmkuh balay brah Soto Toma Poni Yayi uri, kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2006 mi kngkawas 2011 na seyngkyo cida dmayaw muway hbangan hiya. Kiya u bukuy daw wada mtdiyal quwaq ka ddha dha, Patrice Talon u mniq kngkawas 2012 wada hliyan pnhuqil Toma Poni Yayi ka hiya mi wada qduriq France, dhuq kngkawas 2014 cida daw wada mangal snrwanan cumi ka hiya.
S.PHON: = pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan b…ônin ta sajaŇč o kija ka pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon = pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon (ka…ĺi *…ĺan ¶…ô: pat…ĺi ¶…ô guillaum…ô atńßanas…ô talon ; kŇčkawas **** idas *dijax *), ńßija ka taxa b…ônin s…ô…üi …ünwu, kŇčkawas **** mniq soto s…ôŇčkjo wada mbijax maŇčal soto b…ônin, idas * dijax * muda psdńßuwan pńßiju. ndanan nija pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon pa mniq qqpańßan wata ¶j…ô u wada dńßa splawa 'bukuŇč wata', kija ka dmkuńß balaj b…ĺańß soto toma poni jaji u…ĺi, kija mi mniq kŇčkawas **** mi kŇčkawas **** na s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida dmajaw muwaj ńßbaŇčan ńßija. kija u bukuj daw wada mtdijal quwaq ka ddńßa dńßa, pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon u mniq kŇčkawas **** wada ńßlijan pnńßuqil toma poni jaji ka ńßija mi wada qdu…ĺiq *…ĺan ¶…ô, dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida daw wada maŇčal sn…ĺwanan ¶umi ka ńßija.
S.FORM: = Patrice Talon = Mntucing hngkawas 1958 idas 5 jiyax 1 ka Patrice Talon ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Benin ta sayang o kiya ka Patrice Talon, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 5 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Patrice Talon = Patrice Talon (Kari France: Patrice Guillaume Athanase Talon ; kngkawas 1958 idas 5diyax 1), hiya ka taxa Benin seyji jnwu, kngkawas 2016 mniq Soto Seyngkyo wada mbiyax mangal Soto Benin, idas 4 diyax 6 muda psdhuwan phiyu. Ndanan niya Patrice Talon pa mniq Qqpahan Wata Cyey u wada dha splawa 'Bukung Wata', kiya ka dmkuh balay brah Soto Toma Poni Yayi uri, kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2006 mi kngkawas 2011 na seyngkyo cida dmayaw muway hbangan hiya. Kiya u bukuy daw wada mtdiyal quwaq ka ddha dha, Patrice Talon u mniq kngkawas 2012 wada hliyan pnhuqil Toma Poni Yayi ka hiya mi wada qduriq France, dhuq kngkawas 2014 cida daw wada mangal snrwanan cumi ka hiya.
S.PHON: = pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan b…ônin ta sajaŇč o kija ka pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon = pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon (ka…ĺi *…ĺan ¶…ô: pat…ĺi ¶…ô guillaum…ô atńßanas…ô talon ; kŇčkawas **** idas *dijax *), ńßija ka taxa b…ônin s…ô…üi …ünwu, kŇčkawas **** mniq soto s…ôŇčkjo wada mbijax maŇčal soto b…ônin, idas * dijax * muda psdńßuwan pńßiju. ndanan nija pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon pa mniq qqpańßan wata ¶j…ô u wada dńßa splawa 'bukuŇč wata', kija ka dmkuńß balaj b…ĺańß soto toma poni jaji u…ĺi, kija mi mniq kŇčkawas **** mi kŇčkawas **** na s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida dmajaw muwaj ńßbaŇčan ńßija. kija u bukuj daw wada mtdijal quwaq ka ddńßa dńßa, pat…ĺi ¶…ô talon u mniq kŇčkawas **** wada ńßlijan pnńßuqil toma poni jaji ka ńßija mi wada qdu…ĺiq *…ĺan ¶…ô, dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida daw wada maŇčal sn…ĺwanan ¶umi ka ńßija.
